key_metrics: Provision for credit losses of $2.85 billion
Return on tangible common equity (ROTCE) of 21%
qoq_changes: Total net revenue decreased slightly to $44.91 billion from $45.31 billion in the prior quarter
Net income increased to $14.99 billion from $14.64 billion in the prior quarter
Provision for credit losses decreased to $2.85 billion from $3.31 billion in the prior quarter
new_risks: No new risks were explicitly detailed in the provided excerpt
management_tone: Neutral, as strong Markets revenue growth and solid capital ratios were offset by significant year-over-year declines in total noninterest revenue and net income.
analyst_note: JPMorgan's Q2 2025 results show a mixed performance with an 11% YoY revenue decline and 17% YoY net income drop, though sequential stability, a 15% YoY jump in Markets revenue, and a robust 21% ROTCE indicate underlying resilience.
